description.value: Your caustic stomach is the safest place to hide your goods. You Interact to eat an item of 1 Bulk or less. The item takes @Damage[1d6[acid]] damage every hour it stays in your stomach. You're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened] with a value equal to the total Bulk of items you have in your stomach and can't reduce your sickened value below that total while they remain there. You can regurgitate any number of items as a single action into your hands or your square.
